package router

import (
    "acme/project/internal/models"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

func RegisterRoutes(engine *gin.Engine, db *gorm.DB) {
    db.AutoMigrate(&models.User{})
    engine.GET("/users", func(c *gin.Context) {})
}

func init() {
    engine := gin.Default()
    engine.Use()
}
